name: Grave Caller
tips: Grave Caller's activated ability costs 0 mana — you can buff a target's attack by Grave Caller's own Dark Matter stacks every turn for free.
As both a Mage and Undead, Grave Caller benefits from Dark Matter buffs (Shady Trade Deal, Dark Matter Stash) and can be summoned via Reanimated Bones transform (3 mana).
Use the DM buff on your biggest threat each turn. At 5 DM, buffing a Giant Rat or Ratchanter with +5🗡️ per turn snowballs quickly.

At range 1, Grave Caller can attack from the second row while staying protected. Alternate between attacking and its 0-cost buff — each counts as your one action for the turn, so pick whichever contributes more that turn.
Reanimated Bones (1+3 = 4 mana split across turns) is the only way to field Grave Caller in a real match — it never appears in decks or hands, so plan your Bones accordingly.
rulings: The activated ability is a single-target BUFF_ATTACK with scale_with=dark_matter and amount=0. The target gains Grave Caller's DM stacks as bonus 🗡️.
At Grave Caller DM=0, the ability executes cleanly but the +🗡️ is 0 — use Shady Trade Deal / Dark Matter Stash to stack DM on Grave Caller first.
ACTIVATE_ABILITY counts as your one action for the turn — you cannot activate AND attack in the same turn.
Target can be any minion on the board — ally or enemy (picking an enemy is almost never useful, but legal).
